mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_job_posting (parent_id, subject_id, title, description, child_age, class_mode, city, address, budget_min, budget_max, stage_code, education_requirement, schedule, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{subjectId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{childAge}, #{classMode}, #{city}, #{address}, #{budgetMin}, #{budgetMax}, #{stageCode}, #{educationRequirement}, #{schedule}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, subject_id, title, description, child_age, class_mode, city, address, budget_min, budget_max, stage_code, education_requirement, schedule, status, create_time, update_time FROM student_job_posting WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, parent_id, subject_id, title, description, child_age, class_mode, city, address, budget_min, budget_max, stage_code, education_requirement, schedule, status, create_time, update_time FROM student_job_posting WHERE status = 1 AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
